scripts.dev:combined: concurrently -n next,mcp,n8n -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix next-project" "uv run --directory mcp_server python -m uvicorn main:http_app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "npm run start --prefix n8n-local"
scripts.dev:mcp: uv run --directory mcp_server python -m uvicorn main:http_app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
